hero.badge: Indonesia Creative Economy B2B Export Platform
hero.subtitle: Connecting Indonesian MSMEs with international buyers through NIB legality verification, AI Chat Auto-Translation, and Cross-Border QRIS.

features.title: Why Choose NusaTrade?
features.subtitle: End-to-end solutions solving the main export constraints: Legality, Communication, and Customs Logistics.
features.f1_desc: All MSME profiles are directly connected with Ministry of Cooperatives/OSS RI NIB validation to guarantee business legality for international buyers.
features.f2_desc: Negotiate prices and specifications without language barriers. AI automatically converts casual sentences into professional business translations.
features.f3_desc: Ease of cross-border payments using BI QRIS and direct integration with Customs Management Services (PPJK) partners.

cta_bottom.title: Ready to Bring Your Products to Dominate the Global Market?
cta_bottom.subtitle: Join thousands of Indonesian Creative Economy MSMEs and experience the ease of AI-based B2B export.

auth.left_subtitle: Join thousands of Indonesian exporters who have successfully made cross-border transactions easily and safely.

register.ppjk_sub1: Create an account for your agency.
register.liveness_desc: Make sure your face is clearly visible without accessories
register.no_nib_desc: NIB is required to register as a verified exporter.

live_demo.title: Try AI Tone-Shift & Translation Live!
live_demo.subtitle: See how NusaTrade AI transforms casual MSME messages into export-grade professional business English.
live_demo.preset_1_in: Mas sy mau jual kopi gayo 100kg harganya berapa ya bisa nego gak?
live_demo.preset_1_out: Yth. Calon Pembeli, Kami menyediakan 100 kg Kopi Arabika Specialty Gayo organik bersertifikat dengan penawaran harga bersaing.
live_demo.preset_1_en: Dear Valued Buyer, We can supply 100 kg of Premium Organic Gayo Specialty Arabica Coffee with official certification at competitive B2B rates.
live_demo.preset_2_in: Kami ada stok 500 set kursi rotan bali mas bisa kirim ke amerika minggu ini
live_demo.preset_2_out: Kami siap melayani pengiriman 500 set furniture rotan alami kualitas ekspor ke pelabuhan Amerika Serikat pada minggu ini.
live_demo.preset_2_en: We are ready to dispatch 500 sets of export-grade natural rattan furniture to US ports within this week.
live_demo.preset_3_in: Kain batik tulis sutra solo pewarna alam ada sertifikat batikmark resmi mbak
live_demo.preset_3_out: Koleksi kain batik tulis sutra halus Solo kami menggunakan pewarna alami dan telah mengantongi sertifikasi resmi Batikmark Indonesia.
live_demo.preset_3_en: Our fine Solo silk batik collection utilizes 100% natural dyes and holds official Batikmark Indonesia certification.
live_demo.ai_loading: AI Engine Polishing & Translating to B2B English...
live_demo.ready_send: Ready to be sent to international buyers in 50+ countries
live_demo.custom_placeholder: Or type your own product sentence here...
live_demo.footer_text: NusaTrade Tone-Shifting AI technology cuts cultural misunderstandings by 90% in B2B transactions.

landing.supported_by: Supported By Indonesian Trade Ecosystem & Official Institutions
landing.ai_solution_desc: Test firsthand how NusaTrade AI transforms informal local MSME sentences into professional English.

footer.tagline: Empowering Indonesian MSMEs through a secure, transparent, and integrated B2B export platform with the logistics ecosystem.
